title: Find the Middle Index in Array

testcases.input: nums = [2,3,-1,8,4] Output: 3 Explanation: The sum of the numbers before index 3 is: 2 + 3 + -1 = 4 The sum of the numbers after index 3 is: 4 = 4
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The sum of the numbers before index 3 is: 2 + 3 + -1 = 4 The sum of the numbers after index 3 is: 4 = 4

testcases.input: nums = [1,-1,4] Output: 2 Explanation: The sum of the numbers before index 2 is: 1 + -1 = 0 The sum of the numbers after index 2 is: 0
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The sum of the numbers before index 2 is: 1 + -1 = 0 The sum of the numbers after index 2 is: 0

testcases.input: nums = [2,5] Output: -1 Explanation: There is no valid middleIndex.
